title: World Cup 2026 LIVE: Free streams, TV guide & how to watch from anywhere in the world
summary: This will mark the 38-year-old's sixth World Cup, a record he will share with 41-year-old Cristiano Ronaldo, and begs the question: will this be the last World Cup featuring both football legends?
